title: Super Mario MC
description: A mod that brings the world of Super Mario to your game!
body:
Bring the world of Super Mario into Minecraft!

(Requires Geckolib)

Press - to enter the character select! Collect ingredients to make a special portal to the Mushroom Kingdom and explore!

Features hundreds of blocks, many of which are creative exclusive, but fret not for future updates will bring more and more survival content!

Have fun with power-ups, too!
